text:
The receiver will file at court accounts showing all monies [received by [him] / [her]] / [disbursed by [him] / [her]] / [remitted by [him] / [her]] by no later than [date and time] [and at [yearly] / [6 monthly] intervals thereafter].

Those accounts shall be served on:

The respondent

The applicant

[Specify other]

Those served with the accounts shall have a right to inspect the papers relating to the receiver’s discharge of this appointment and [reflected] / [summarised] in those accounts within office hours on reasonable notice, notified to the receiver within [number] days of service of such accounts.

If the court requires the receiver to attend court in connection with an allegation of non-compliance with any rule, practice direction or direction as to the carrying out of [his] / [her] duties [he] / [she] must do so. In default the court may [terminate the appointment] / [give directions reducing the receiver’s remuneration] / [make orders as to the payment of the costs of any party].

The court may give directions requiring the receiver to pay monies into court. In default of compliance with such an order, the court may further order that interest be paid on that sum.

The following further provisions shall apply to the receiver’s remuneration:

[insert].

The receiver may apply for further directions relating to the discharge of [his] / [her] functions.

Sums remaining due for payment under the order | £[amount]

Interest to the date of the order | £[amount]

Quantified costs incurred prior to the date of the hearing | £[amount]

Item | Value | Likely Income

[Item] | £[amount] | £[amount]

[Item] | £[amount] | £[amount]
